name: HWM_TM_ALLOW_EXPS_V
query: SELECT TimeMessagePEO.TM_REP_MSGS_ID, TimeMessagePEO.APPLICATION_ID, TimeMessagePEO.APPLICATION_SHORT_NAME, TimeMessagePEO.MESSAGE_NAME, TimeMessagePEO.MESSAGE_LEVEL, TimeMessagePEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_ID, TimeMessagePEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_VERSION, TimeMessagePEO.ENTERPRISE_ID, TimeMessagePEO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TimeMessagePEO.TM_REP_ATRB_USAGE_ID, TimeMessagePEO.TM_REC_ID, TimeMessagePEO.TM_REC_VERSION, TimeMessagePEO.TM_REC_GRP_ID, TimeMessagePEO.TM_REC_GRP_VERSION, TimeMessagePEO.TRN_ID, TimeMessagePEO.TM_EVENT_ID, TimeMessagePEO.MESSAGE_FIELD, TimeMessagePEO.DATE_FROM, TimeMessagePEO.DATE_TO, TimeMessagePEO.CREATED_BY, TimeMessagePEO.CREATION_DATE, TimeMessagePEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TimeMessagePEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TimeMessagePEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, AllowExceptionPEO.TM_REP_ALLOW_EXPS_ID, AllowExceptionPEO.ALLOW_EXCEPTION, DECODE(TimeMessagePEO.TM_REP_MSGS_ID, NULL, NULL, NVL(AllowExceptionPEO.ALLOW_EXCEPTION, 'N')) ALLOW_EXCEPTION_FLAG, AllowExceptionPEO.CREATED_BY AllowEx_CREATED_BY, AllowExceptionPEO.CREATION_DATE AllowEx_CREATION_DATE, AllowExceptionPEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY AllowEx_LAST_UPDATED_BY, AllowExceptionPEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AllowEx_LAST_UPDATE_DATE, AllowExceptionPEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN AllowEx_LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWM_TM_REP_MSGS TimeMessagePEO, HWM_TM_REP_ALLOW_EXPS AllowExceptionPEO WHERE TimeMessagePEO.MESSAGE_NAME = AllowExceptionPEO.TM_REP_MSGS_NAME(+) AND TimeMessagePEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_ID = AllowExceptionPEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_ID(+) AND TimeMessagePEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_VERSION = AllowExceptionPEO.TM_BLDG_BLK_VERSION(+) AND AllowExceptionPEO.CREATION_DATE (+) BETWEEN TimeMessagePEO.DATE_FROM AND TimeMessagePEO.DATE_TO
